title: Wire transfer limit increase
summary: Customer requested a same-day increase to a large outgoing transfer limit.

title: Mismatch between legal name and tax record
summary: Submitted onboarding documents do not match the tax entity name on file.

title: Urgent card spending unlock for travel
summary: Priority customer requested an urgent temporary spending unlock before international travel.

title: Business account name correction
summary: Submitted legal documents to correct the registered business name.

title: Repeated beneficiary bank update
summary: Beneficiary bank details have been updated twice in 24 hours for the same payout profile.

title: Document resubmission after prior rejection
summary: Customer resubmitted compliance documents after prior corrections and they have been approved.

title: Manual payout review for new destination country
summary: Large payout requested to a destination country not previously used by this account.

title: Low-value address change request
summary: Customer requested an address change with supporting utility bill.

title: Repeated payout destination change
summary: Third payout destination change requested in two days for the same merchant account.

title: Escalated source-of-funds clarification
summary: Case was escalated after conflicting explanations about source of funds.

title: Rejected duplicate business verification
summary: Duplicate verification submission for a business already verified under the same legal entity.

title: Priority customer ownership update
summary: Ownership structure changed and new beneficial owner documents were uploaded.

title: Large cross-border payout to sanctioned-adjacent region
summary: Payout of $48,000 requested to a correspondent bank in a jurisdiction bordering a sanctioned country.

title: Velocity spike on merchant settlement account
summary: Settlement volume increased 400% week-over-week with no corresponding support ticket or seasonal explanation.

title: Expired ID document on active account
summary: Primary identity document on file expired 30 days ago. Account activity remains within normal range.

title: Duplicate payment reversal request
summary: Customer submitted two identical reversal requests for the same $2,150 payment within an hour.

title: Priority onboarding with incomplete UBO declaration
summary: New priority-tier corporate account submitted onboarding with missing ultimate beneficial owner information for one shareholder.

title: Account closure with pending outbound transfer
summary: Customer requested immediate account closure, but a $12,500 outbound wire is still queued and unprocessed.

title: Chargeback dispute exceeding policy threshold
summary: Merchant disputed a chargeback of $8,700 but provided no supporting evidence within the 10-day window.

title: Suspicious login pattern before large transfer
summary: Account accessed from three different countries within 6 hours, followed by a $95,000 transfer request.

title: Routine annual KYC refresh
summary: Annual know-your-customer refresh completed with all documents current and no material changes.

title: Third-party API key rotation after breach disclosure
summary: Partner disclosed a potential credential leak. Customer's API keys were rotated but three pending webhooks may have been exposed.
